name: MBI Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - MBI Deuda Privada Fondo de Inversion
summary: MBI Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - MBI Deuda Privada Fondo de Inversion invests in private debt. MBI Administradora General de Fondos S.A. manages the fund. The fund aims to generate returns through investments in privately placed debt instruments.
